24.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
24.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

24.kj: commotion, confused noise, earthquake, fierceness, quaking, rattling, rushing, shaking.

24.gl: commotion, restlessness (of a horse), crash (of thunder), disquiet, anger

25.kj: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.

break, chop in pieces, lay open, scatter, spread (abroad, forth, selves, out), stretch (forth, out).

a flower (from its brilliancy); also a hawk (from it flashing speed)

the eagle (or other large bird of prey)

28.gl: a net, or (abstractly) capture; also a fastness

29.kj: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.

29.kj: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.
